chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 20 – The Salawāt (Blessings) upon the Prophet Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/106)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/106)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ ذُكِرْتُ عِنْدَهُ فَنَسِيَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَيَّ خَطَأَ اللَّهُ بِهِ طَرِيقَ الْجَنَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Al Husayn Bin Ali, from Ubeys Bin Hisham, from Sabit, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The one in whose presence Isaww am mentioned, so he forgets that he should be sending Salawāt upon mesaww, Allahazwj would Cause him to err on the road to the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 20. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Ali from ‘Ubays ibn Hisham from Thabit from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘If my name is mentioned before a person and he forgets to ask from Allah al-Salat (favors) for me, Allah will make him lose the way to paradise.’”
